hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' < /dev/stdin); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'api/generated'; then echo 'BLOCKED: files in api/generated/ are auto-generated and must not be hand-edited. Run pnpm api:generate instead.' && exit 1; fi; exit 0

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' < /dev/stdin); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then cd /Users/viktorlevine/Work/modulith-frontend && pnpm typecheck 2>&1 | head -30; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' < /dev/stdin); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then cd /Users/viktorlevine/Work/modulith-frontend && npx eslint --no-warn-ignored "$FILE" 2>&1 | head -20; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' < /dev/stdin); REPO=/Users/viktorlevine/Work/modulith-frontend; if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; REL=${FILE#${REPO}/}; SKILLS=""; case "$REL" in app/api/*) SKILLS="bff-route-review";; proxy.ts|lib/safe-next-path.ts|lib/session.ts|lib/constants.ts) SKILLS="bff-route-review";; components/can.tsx|lib/org-permissions.ts|lib/org-permission-strings.ts|lib/org-roles.ts|lib/org-permissions.test.ts) SKILLS="permission-review";; components/organizations/*|app/\(app\)/app/organizations/*|app/\(app\)/app/o/*) SKILLS="permission-review";; components/ui/*) SKILLS="basui-composition-check";; esac; if [ -n "$SKILLS" ]; then for S in $SKILLS; do case "$S" in basui-composition-check) printf '
<system-reminder>
You edited a primitive in components/ui/. Base UI parts that require a context ancestor (Menu.GroupLabel → Menu.Group, Tabs.Tab → Tabs.List, etc.) fail only at runtime — not at typecheck. Before ending the turn, either (a) mount the affected surface in dev, or (b) confirm the ancestor wrappers are present at every call site. See components/ui/AGENTS.md for the cheat sheet.
</system-reminder>
';; *) printf '
<system-reminder>
The edit touched a file whose review is owned by the %s skill. Before ending the turn, invoke that skill (or justify skipping it). Relevant file: %s
</system-reminder>
' "$S" "$REL";; esac; done; fi; exit 0
cd /Users/viktorlevine/Work/modulith-frontend && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test --run 2>&1 | tail -20 && npx -y react-doctor@latest . --diff --staged --fail-on error 2>&1 | tail -30
